summary: Outcome-driven host-product matching: graph edge weights (potential_match, has_sold) drive ranking; prediction module emits GMV band, conversion, engagement, risks, action_type, and confidence; GET /v1/recommendations exposes extended host_product_match schema with rules fallback when LLM quota is exhausted.

criticalFindings.description: src/modules/catalog/domain/recommendations/engine.py:get_host_product_matching — score_livestream is awaited inside creator×product nested loops (N+1). Acceptable for MVP limit=3 shops; batch or cache livestream scores before P1-4 scale.

interfaceChanges.description: PredictedOutcome estimation and action CTA builders
Response items include match_score, predicted_outcome, action_type, confidence, source

mappings.criterion: AC1: Rankings use graph edge weights when present
AC4: LLM quota exceeded → source rules

recommendations: Cache per-livestream scores in get_host_product_matching before UI scale (P1-4).
